messages.content: ugh my back is killing me, turning 41 next month and my body is letting me know lol

Ha, the body does have a way of sending those little birthday reminders! 😄

Back pain is no joke though - are you doing anything to help it, like stretching or anything? Sometimes just getting up and moving around a bit helps, especially if you've been sitting for a while.

What's been going on - did you do something to it or is it more of a "just woke up like this" situation?
spent the whole weekend assembling furniture for my daughter's dorm, she starts college in the fall

Oh wow, that's a big milestone - both for her and for you! First kid heading off to college?

And yeah, that kind of weekend will absolutely wreck your back - all that crouching, twisting, reading confusing instructions... furniture assembly is basically a full contact sport. 😄 Your back earned those complaints!

How are you feeling about her leaving? That's got to be a mix of emotions - proud, excited for her, maybe a little bittersweet?
my wife keeps telling me to stretch first and i keep not listening, classic

Ha, classic indeed! There's something very human about knowing exactly what we should do and just... not doing it. 😄

And now you have the joy of your wife being completely right, which I'm sure she's being very gracious about 😉

How old is your daughter? It's kind of wild to think about - you're turning 41, she's heading to college... must feel like time just flew by.
anyway we're doing a little anniversary dinner friday, 15 years. trying to pick somewhere decent downtown

Oh nice, 15 years - congratulations! And a good excuse for a proper dinner out.

What kind of food are you two into? And are you thinking more cozy and intimate, or a livelier kind of place? That might help narrow it down.

Also do you have a budget range in mind, or are you going full "it's our anniversary" mode? 😄
